LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF LALEH ZELINSKY'S MOTION FOR ORDER APPOINTING RECEIVER TO MANAGE PROPERTY IS CONTINUED TO MAY 14, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 7, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 7, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Mtn For Order Appointing Receiver To Manage Property
Off Calendar May-07-2014 Continued To May-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LALEH ZELINSKY's Motion For Order Appointing Receiver To Manage Property is continued to May 14, 2014 to give moving and opposing parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 7, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 7, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
